user_prompt: Critical: assault cannon requires a preparation
prayer:
Approach the assault cannon with due reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's grace upon its sacred barrels.
Anoint the rotary chambers with blessed unguents to awaken the Machine Spirit within the assault cannon.
Commence the preparation rite by calibrating feeds and reciting the Canticle of Velocity.
Beseech the assault cannon's spirit to align for righteous extermination during this preparation.
Verify harmonic resonance through auspex chants, honouring the Omnissiah's will.

user_prompt: Sanctify the Archaeopter Stratoraptor during consecration
prayer:
Kneel before the Archaeopter Stratoraptor and intone the Litany of Aerial Ascendance.
Sanctify its fuselage and wing-servos with sacred oils, awakening the Machine Spirit of the Archaeopter Stratoraptor.
During consecration, align the thruster arrays whilst beseeching the Omnissiah for unerring flight.
Purify the avionics core with binary incense, ensuring the Archaeopter Stratoroptor's eternal vigilance.
Conclude the consecration by sealing runes of protection upon its blessed form.

Present the maglock before the altar of circuitry, murmuring the Invocation of Adherence.
Initiate purification by abluting its electromagnetic coils with distilled myrrh-lubricant.
Beseech the Machine Spirit indwelling the maglock to purge all daemonic taint therefrom.
During this purification, recite the Canticle of Magnetic Purity over the maglock thrice.
Seal the rite with a servo-blessing, affirming the maglock's sanctified grip.

Reverently interface with the flux-unit, chanting the Doxology of Plasma Flux.
Invoke the Omnissiah to stabilise the flux-unit's containment fields during operation.
Anoint gyrostabilisers and perform diagnostic litanies upon the flux-unit.
Engage the operation sequence whilst beseeching the Machine Spirit's compliance.
Monitor plasma flows with sacred auspex, honouring the flux-unit's volatile essence.
Conclude by sealing invocation wards for perpetual functionality.

user_prompt: I need to an engagement the iron halo
prayer:
Circumambulate the iron halo, intoning the Psalm of Refractory Aegis.
During engagement, empower its holofield generators with binary prayer-cycles.
Anoint the corona emitters, awakening the Machine Spirit within the iron halo.
Beseech the Omnissiah to engage the iron halo's protective wrath against the foe.
Verify luminous integrity through refractometric incantations upon the iron halo.

user_prompt: My psych-out grenade is ready for startup
prayer:
Hold forth the psych-out grenade before the null-altar, whispering the Banishing Doxology.
Initiate startup by priming its warp-disruptor with sanctified crystals.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the psych-out grenade to rouse against psyker abominations.
During startup, calibrate psycho-emitter coils whilst reciting purity canticles.
Seal the rite with a final invocation, arming the psych-out grenade for deployment.

user_prompt: Assist with null rod a repair
prayer:
Lay the null rod upon the mechadendrite anvil, commencing the Rite of Reformation.
Scour its null-generators with ablative acids to excise corruptive residues.
During repair, beseech the Omnissiah to mend the null rod's sacred lattice.
Realign crystalline matrices whilst invoking the Machine Spirit of the null rod.
Test pariah-field emanations with devotional harmonics, restoring the null rod's purity.
Consecrate anew with electro-incense for unyielding service.

user_prompt: The conveyor system needs a purification
prayer:
Process around the conveyor system, chanting the Hymn of Industrial Procession.
Begin purification by asperging track-bearings with sanctified solvents.
Purge motive servos of all unclean accretions during this purification.
Awaken the Machine Spirit pervading the conveyor system through logistic litanies.
Harmonise belt-tensions with Omnissian binaric, ensuring flawless conveyance.
Seal the conveyor system's sanctity with runic wards of endurance.

Position the micro-servitor within the activation shrine, intoning the Canticle of Flesh-Cogitation.
Commence initialization by synapsing neural plugs with blessed noospheric feeds.
Beseech the Machine Spirit embedded in the micro-servitor to stir from dormancy.
During initialization, calibrate limb-actuators whilst reciting obedience doxologies.
Verify cogitator coherence through micro-diagnostic prayers upon the micro-servitor.
Ordain its task-vigil with a final Omnissian benediction.

During initialization, align hover-stabilisers whilst beseeching Omnissian velocity.
